questions.question: Are at least 3 topic JSON files present in /public/content/ and do they include all 3 quiz types (single, multi, flashcard)?
questions.actionable_check: List files in public/content/ and inspect each for single, multi, and flashcard questions
evidence_required: quiz type samples from each file
questions.pass_criteria: 3+ JSON files exist, each with questions covering single/multi/flashcard types

questions.question: Does the content normalization in content.ts correctly validate and map to the Topic TypeScript type?
questions.actionable_check: Read src/lib/content.ts normalizeTopic function and verify it validates slug, title, description, quiz, studyPlan
questions.pass_criteria: normalizeTopic validates required fields and returns null for invalid data

questions.question: Does the storage abstraction handle localStorage unavailability gracefully?
questions.actionable_check: Read src/lib/storage.ts isStorageAvailable and readItem/writeItem functions
questions.pass_criteria: Storage functions return defaults when localStorage unavailable, no exceptions thrown

questions.question: Does the Topics page show All Topics and My Topics tabs with correct content?
questions.actionable_check: Navigate to /topics and verify tabs exist, all topics visible in All tab, empty state in My Topics tab
questions.pass_criteria: Both tabs render correctly with all topics shown and proper empty state

questions.question: Does topic selection persist in localStorage using the lp_selectedTopics_v1 key?
questions.actionable_check: Select a topic and inspect localStorage lp_selectedTopics_v1 value
evidence_required: localStorage key present with selected slug
questions.pass_criteria: Selected topic slug appears in lp_selectedTopics_v1.slugs array

mandatory_questions.question: Do all 6 Story 02 Playwright E2E tests pass?
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: All 6 E2E tests pass including topic display, selection, persistence, and empty state

mandatory_questions.question: Do all Story 01 E2E tests still pass (no regressions)?
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: No regressions in Story 01 routing and navigation tests
